Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Phew, glad to see you awake![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You really scared us, passing out like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Mitsuru-senpai asked me to come just in case, and I get caught up in something like this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}While I was fixing your body, I added some additional equipment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}We found some strange things under the floor...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}There was no sign that you would wake up, so instead of waiting, we tried everything we could.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}It still sucks though, getting bossed around by her like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}That girl told us, "If you want to protect Aigis, you should put that on her."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Hey, sounds like you've had a rough time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}No worries here, though. She's on her best behavior now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I guess she wasn't lying after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Anyway, she can't cause any trouble now. We have our Evokers this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Man, why do you gotta bust things up like that!? It's my turn to clean the place today![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}How about you quit it with the silent treatment and say something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Are you serious? You were sleeping all this time!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}You were lookin' pretty comfy there... Guess you don't think of us humans as much of a threat, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I-It's just, I was tired after going into Orgia Mode, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Did you cooperate with them in order to help me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}The reason I came here in the first place was to protect you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}You don't need to restrain me. I won't attack anyone anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Why the sudden change of heart? You can't expect us to trust you without an explanation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}It's because... I thought you wouldn't like me if I did.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I don't know if she can be trusted, but I believe she has no intention of attacking us any further.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Besides, if she's really like me, then the restraints won't hold her anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Seriously...? Then all those friggin' nonstop shifts were for nothing...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}First, tell us who you are and your purpose in being here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}My name is... Metis. As you can see, you and I are essentially sister units.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}In fact, you are the reason why I'm here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}I've come to save you from this hopeless situation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Did... something happen while I was asleep?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}Speaking of which, how long was I asleep?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Since our battle ended, I'd say about a day and a half has passed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}Tomorrow, and all the days after it, will also be March 31st. At this rate, it will last forever.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Didn't you feel it? The moment {f 0 1 2}time looped{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}Looped? Do you mean what we felt at midnight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Then... are you saying that the same day is repeating itself!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}That's not all... We haven't been able to leave the dorm either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}That makes two ways we're trapped here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}Both space and time are being distorted by the {f 0 1 2}Abyss of Time{f 0 1 27} beneath us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}It's difficult to explain. It'd be easier to show you.[n]{f 1 1}
